title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BSNL Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at BSNL Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BSNL Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
